Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===FINGERPRINT===' && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT parameter_name, COUNT\(*\) AS n, ROUND\(MIN\(value\),2\) AS min, ROUND\(AVG\(value\),2\) AS avg, ROUND\(MAX\(value\),2\) AS max FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=3 GROUP BY parameter_name ORDER BY parameter_name;\\" 2>&1; echo '===COOLANT TIMELINE \(30s buckets\)===' && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT strftime\('%M:%S', timestamp\) AS mmss, ROUND\(AVG\(value\),1\) AS coolant_c FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=3 AND parameter_name='COOLANT_TEMP' GROUP BY CAST\(\(strftime\('%s', timestamp\) / 30\) AS INT\) ORDER BY timestamp LIMIT 30;\\" 2>&1; echo '===LAST ROWS===' && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT timestamp, parameter_name, ROUND\(value,2\) AS value FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=3 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;\\" 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT timestamp, ROUND\(value,1\) AS coolant_c FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=3 AND parameter_name='COOLANT_TEMP' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;\\" 2>&1; echo '---DRIVE END QUERY---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT drive_id, drive_start_timestamp, drive_end_timestamp FROM drive_summary WHERE drive_id=3;\\" 2>&1; echo '---MAX COOLANT IN DRIVE---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT ROUND\(MAX\(value\),1\) AS peak_coolant_c FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=3 AND parameter_name='COOLANT_TEMP';\\" 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===SYNC_LOG STATE===' && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT table_name, COUNT\(*\) AS entries, MAX\(last_synced_id\) AS last_id, MAX\(last_sync_at\) AS last_attempt FROM sync_log GROUP BY table_name;\\" 2>&1; echo '===SYNC_LOG SCHEMA===' && sqlite3 data/obd.db '.schema sync_log' 2>&1 | head -10; echo '===SERVER URL IN CONFIG===' && python -c \\"import json; c=json.load\(open\('config.json'\)\); print\('pi.sync:', c.get\('pi',{}\).get\('sync'\)\); print\('pi.server:', c.get\('pi',{}\).get\('server'\)\)\\" 2>&1; echo '===HTTP REACHABILITY===' && curl -sS -m 3 -w 'HTTP %{http_code}\\n' http://10.27.27.10:8000/docs -o /dev/null 2>&1; echo '===RECENT SERVICE LOG sync===' && sudo journalctl -u eclipse-obd --since '20 minutes ago' 2>&1 | grep -iE 'sync|http|post' | tail -10")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===NOW '$\(date -u +%H:%M:%SZ\)'==='; python -c 'import sys;sys.path.insert\(0,\\"src\\"\);sys.path.insert\(0,\\".\\"\);from pi.hardware.ups_monitor import UpsMonitor;m=UpsMonitor\(\);print\(f\\"SOC={m.getBatteryPercentage\(\):.1f}%  VCELL={m.getBatteryVoltage\(\):.3f}V  Source={m.getPowerSource\(\).name}\\"\);m.close\(\)' 2>&1; echo '---DEPLOYED pi.power CONFIG---'; python -c \\"import json; c=json.load\(open\('config.json'\)\); import json; print\(json.dumps\(c.get\('pi',{}\).get\('power',{}\), indent=2\)\)\\" 2>&1; echo '---battery_health_log---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT drain_event_id, start_timestamp, end_timestamp, start_soc, end_soc, runtime_seconds, load_class FROM battery_health_log ORDER BY drain_event_id DESC LIMIT 5;' 2>&1; echo '---power_log RECENT---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT timestamp, event_type FROM power_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;' 2>&1; echo '---SERVICE---'; systemctl show eclipse-obd -p ActiveState -p MainPID 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===BOOT TIME==='; uptime -s; uptime; echo '---HARD-CRASH SIGNATURE---'; dmesg 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'orphan|ext4-fs.*mount|systemd-fsck' | head -3; echo '===BATTERY_HEALTH_LOG==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT * FROM battery_health_log;' 2>&1; echo '===POWER_LOG==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS rows, MAX\(timestamp\) AS latest FROM power_log;' 2>&1; echo '===CURRENT POWER STATE==='; python -c 'import sys;sys.path.insert\(0,\\"src\\"\);sys.path.insert\(0,\\".\\"\);from pi.hardware.ups_monitor import UpsMonitor;m=UpsMonitor\(\);print\(f\\"SOC={m.getBatteryPercentage\(\):.1f}%  VCELL={m.getBatteryVoltage\(\):.3f}V  Source={m.getPowerSource\(\).name}\\"\);m.close\(\)' 2>&1; echo '===SYNC STATE POST-BOOT==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT table_name, last_synced_id, last_synced_at, status FROM sync_log;' 2>&1; echo '===SERVICE==='; systemctl show eclipse-obd -p ActiveState -p SubState -p MainPID 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===LATEST DRIVE==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT MAX\(drive_id\) AS max_drive_id, COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM realtime_data;' 2>&1; echo '---NEW DRIVE_SUMMARY---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT drive_id, drive_start_timestamp, ROUND\(ambient_temp_at_start_c,1\) AS iat, ROUND\(starting_battery_v,2\) AS batt, ROUND\(barometric_kpa_at_start,1\) AS baro FROM drive_summary ORDER BY drive_id DESC LIMIT 3;' 2>&1; echo '---LATEST CONN EVENTS---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT timestamp, event_type, success FROM connection_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 6;' 2>&1; echo '---LIVE BATTERY/RPM SAMPLE \(newest 6 rows\)---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT timestamp, parameter_name, ROUND\(value,2\) AS value FROM realtime_data WHERE parameter_name IN \('BATTERY_V','RPM','COOLANT_TEMP','LONG_FUEL_TRIM_1'\) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;\\" 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===DRIVE 4 FINGERPRINT \(last 3 min\)==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT parameter_name, COUNT\(*\) AS n, ROUND\(MIN\(value\),2\) AS min, ROUND\(AVG\(value\),2\) AS avg, ROUND\(MAX\(value\),2\) AS max FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=4 AND id > \(SELECT MAX\(id\)-200 FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=4\) GROUP BY parameter_name ORDER BY parameter_name;\\" 2>&1; echo '---BATTERY_V TREND \(every 30s, last 5 min\)---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT strftime\('%H:%M:%S', timestamp\) AS time, ROUND\(value,2\) AS battery_v FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=4 AND parameter_name='BATTERY_V' AND timestamp > datetime\('now','-5 minutes'\) GROUP BY CAST\(strftime\('%s', timestamp\)/30 AS INT\) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;\\" 2>&1; echo '---DRIVE 4 META vs SCHEMA---'; sqlite3 data/obd.db \\"SELECT * FROM drive_summary WHERE drive_id=4;\\" 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===CONNECTION_LOG: drive_end fired? \(US-229 test\)==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT timestamp, event_type, success FROM connection_log WHERE timestamp > datetime\(\\"now\\",\\"-15 minutes\\"\) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 15;' 2>&1; echo '===DRIVE 4 FINAL STATE==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT * FROM drive_summary WHERE drive_id=4;' 2>&1; echo '---ROW COUNT FINAL---'; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT drive_id, COUNT\(*\) AS rows, MIN\(timestamp\) AS first, MAX\(timestamp\) AS last FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=4 GROUP BY drive_id;' 2>&1; echo '===CURRENT POWER STATE==='; python -c 'import sys;sys.path.insert\(0,\\"src\\"\);sys.path.insert\(0,\\".\\"\);from pi.hardware.ups_monitor import UpsMonitor;m=UpsMonitor\(\);print\(f\\"SOC={m.getBatteryPercentage\(\):.1f}%  VCELL={m.getBatteryVoltage\(\):.3f}V  Source={m.getPowerSource\(\).name}\\"\);m.close\(\)' 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && echo '===CONNECTION_LOG \(last 10 events\)==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT timestamp, event_type, success FROM connection_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;' 2>&1; echo '===DRIVE_SUMMARY \(last 3\)==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT drive_id, drive_start_timestamp, ambient_temp_at_start_c, starting_battery_v, barometric_kpa_at_start FROM drive_summary ORDER BY drive_id DESC LIMIT 3;' 2>&1; echo '===LIVE FINGERPRINT \(newest 12 rows\)==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT timestamp, parameter_name, ROUND\(value,2\) AS value, drive_id FROM realtime_data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 12;\\" 2>&1; echo '===POWER STATE==='; python -c 'import sys;sys.path.insert\(0,\\"src\\"\);sys.path.insert\(0,\\".\\"\);from pi.hardware.ups_monitor import UpsMonitor;m=UpsMonitor\(\);print\(f\\"SOC={m.getBatteryPercentage\(\):.1f}%  VCELL={m.getBatteryVoltage\(\):.3f}V  Source={m.getPowerSource\(\).name}\\"\);m.close\(\)' 2>&1; echo '===SYNC STATE==='; sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db 'SELECT table_name, last_synced_id, last_synced_at, status FROM sync_log;' 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 chi-eclipse-01 "cd ~/Projects/Eclipse-01 && sqlite3 -column -header data/obd.db \\"SELECT timestamp, ROUND\(value,1\) AS coolant_c FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=5 AND parameter_name='COOLANT_TEMP' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 6;\\" 2>&1; echo '---DURATION---'; sqlite3 data/obd.db \\"SELECT \(julianday\(MAX\(timestamp\)\)-julianday\(MIN\(timestamp\)\)\)*24*60 AS minutes, COUNT\(*\) AS rows FROM realtime_data WHERE drive_id=5;\\" 2>&1")
